title: sutera procumbens
intro: Sutera procumbens, also known as Sutera or Blue Thistle, is a flowering plant species within the Phlox family. It is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sutera procumbens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Sutera procumbens is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried flower for herbal remedies, and is commonly used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
